entry.title: No more
entry.summary:
Author: ForgottenOne201

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,612Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 50

Summary: After the climax of actions with gerard circumstances push stiles to discover a truce about himself specifically his mother’s bloodline. New complications arise when a pack of alphas arrives in town and between learning more about himself and staying alive stiles falls for a certain grumpy alpha.

entry.title: My Name is Ours at Night
entry.summary:
Author: strawberry_chicken

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,557Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 17

Summary: (End season 2) After a ritual gone wrong, Stiles should be dead. Instead, he wakes up with a hole in his body and something inside him—something wrong, something hungry. Derek knows there's a threat in town. He just didn't expect it to look like Stiles.

entry.title: The Bonds that Bind
entry.summary:
Author: applejuice382

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 346,200Chapters: 23/25Kudos: 1,768

Summary: Stiles is just trying to prevent the next supernatural problem from killing his friends. Derek is just trying to keep his pack alive (and ignore the desperation that crawls under his skin whenever Stiles is near). When Stiles goes into the preserve to investigate a string of murders, he and Derek are kidnapped by an unknown group and locked in a basement with no escape. Each night brings new suffering, and each day they have only each other. The two will have to learn how to lean on one another to keep their sanity intact, and they’ll have to work together to escape. Too bad they annoy the shit out of each other.

entry.title: Tangled, Ravelled, and Undogged
entry.summary:
Author: Stout

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 27,005Chapters: 5/9Kudos: 38

Summary: After making several mistakes in a row, Stiles finds himself stuck in a haunted manor the middle of a cursed wood, and faced with a terrifying, monstrous Beast demanding custody of whatever creature first greets Stiles at his front gate in exchange for Stiles' freedom. (But the Beast never said that Stiles couldn't visit.)

entry.title: A Very Stilinski Affair
entry.summary:
Author: Christina786

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,998Chapters: 2/14Kudos: 5

Summary: Derek frowned. “You Stilinskis really have to be that honest?”She shrugged. “What’s the point in being secretive and mysterious?”Now Derek grinned “Oh, you should meet my uncle, you’d hate him.” This is based on a post on tumblr in which Stiles is afraid that Derek might fall for his sibling once he meets them. It kind of got out of hand and I started indulging in some morally gray but not evil Peter. Basically, Peter falls for Stiles' sister instead, because they kind of bond over their different but slightly similar traumas and it turns out Stiles' sister has been hiding a few bodies in her closet.

entry.title: Rip My Ribcage Open (And Devour What Is Truly Yours)
entry.summary:
Author: Welsh_Woman

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,896Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 292

Summary: After so many years of fighting all the strange shit that Beacon Hills throws at them, the McCall Pack are a little leery when they are visited by a Pack that claims they're there to help them become more of a team, more of a family... When the Hale Pack arrive and speak of a long standing claim to the Beacon Hills territory, Scott is instantly suspicious and combative, but Stiles wants to know who these newcomers are and what they can share. And why he feels so drawn to their Alpha, to a man that seems to be just as entranced by Stiles, despite the fact that he holds a secret that might topple the fraught bonds the McCall Pack share.

entry.title: Stiles Stilinski Is Not OKay
entry.summary:
Author: GhastlyHollow

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,431Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Kicked out of the pack with no friends and no one to turn to, Stiles Stilinski uses the isolation to focus on herself especially now that strange supernatural changes are happening to her body. Haunted by nightmares of the Nemeton and visions of her dead mother, Stiles struggles to figure out what’s real and what isn’t as her reality begins to collapse.Meanwhile, killings start up again in Beacon Hills, and the arrival of a new alpha pack immediately raises red flags definitely not giving Deucalion 2.0 vibes… at all.As tensions rise and old alliances fall apart, Stiles finds herself uncovering a much darker truth hiding beneath it all.And through everything, through the danger, the isolation, and the fear of what she might be becoming she’s still hopelessly, painfully in love with one sour wolf.

entry.title: The nogitsune
entry.summary:
Author: UrNewtmas_ObsessedGirl

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,989Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 72

Summary: When Stiles goes missing for three weeks and suddenly shows up at the loft, there's something off. His scent. Everything. And when his eyes glow gold instead of his usual brown, Derek knows something is horribly wrong. I suck at summary's.Tags will be updated as the story gets updated.

entry.title: If I could turn back time..... oh wait, I can!
entry.summary:
Author: Werewolfintraining

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,069Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 56

Summary: Agent Stilinski received the call late afternoon. He had to return to the Hellmouth in a hurry. He really thought there was enough time. He was prepared to face the demon once again. He was not prepared to see Derek Hale sacrifice himself, again.He has one chance, the cost is high, but Derek and his pup are worth it.He's willing to pay whatever the magic deems worthy.He pays in years, but he gains something unexpected.Ok. Now he's here. Is he supposed to save Peter too?

entry.summary:
Author: allhalechris

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 55,499Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 443

Summary: Derek: Do you wanna sleep with me?Stiles: Do u mean like a nap or are we gonna fuck?Derek: YesThe one where Derek is a low level drug dealer who grew up in the system and tries to win over Lacrosse Jock Stiles, aka son of the Sherriff, who has a thing for self destructive really really ridiculously good looking, soft gangsters.

entry.title: SunnyDay Preschool
entry.summary:
Author: RukiaKiryu

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,831Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 209

Summary: Stiles thought he was ready for his first year of being a preschool teacher. For the tiny temper tantrums and never ending bouts of flu. The rowdy 4 year olds and overprotective parents. He prided himself at being adaptable. He was prepared! Or at least, he thought he was. He's a little less confident when his favorite three year old starts turning into a half wolf-baby just before nap time. And even less so when he finds out he's now the kid's anchor. Not to mention Eli's insanely attractive father happens to be the sweetest, kindest and most anxious alpha-werewolf in the state of California.

entry.title: The Legend of The Alpha
entry.summary:
Author: Killmesoftly_s

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,067Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 84

Summary: The Alpha was feared for so long. He was a darkness, a demon who knew nothing beyond the jungle's wilds. No man or woman was foolish enough to speak to the spirit, ask it its name. The villagers called the spirit, The Alpha.  He was more than a man but not an ape. There were whispers of his nails becoming small knives and his eyes shining ruby red. No one ever got close enough to say for certain if these things were true, but no one would dare argue against it. None who’d seen the alpha, face to face, lived to tell the tale. Whether they died at his hands or the apes he called family, it did not matter.   It's been years since the Alpha-also known as Derek Hale, left Africa to live in England with his husband; Stiles. Danger lurks on the horizon as Adrian Harris and his sadistic league devise a scheme that lures the couple to the Congo. Harris plans to capture the Alpha and deliver him to an old enemy in exchange for diamonds. When Stiles becomes a pawn in his devious plot, Derek must return to the jungle to save the man he loves.

entry.title: Part Four: New Years Eve
entry.summary:
Author: FastFadingFiction

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,356Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 49

Summary: Stiles had a faculty New Year’s fundraiser. Derek had a mandatory appearance attached to it because apparently being one half of Blackthorn College’s most visibly supernatural married faculty pair made him “excellent for donor relations,” which remained one of the more offensive phrases Derek had heard in recent memory. So, now Penny Ashford was coming over to babysit.

entry.title: safe with me
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,981Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 30

Summary: “I hate going to sleep without you,” Derek mumbles, face against Stiles’ throat. “I need to know that you’re safe. With me.” “I’m sorry,” Stiles says again, truly meaning it. He kisses Derek’s shoulder, nuzzling his skin. Derek’s only in sweatpants, his torso bare and warm against Stiles. “Let me make it up to you.” Stiles knows what Derek needs, and Derek surrenders. He lays still as he blinks at Stiles with heavy eyelids, entrusting Stiles completely. All he wants is to have Stiles close, and Stiles goes easily. He leans in and kisses the side of Derek’s neck gently, close to his mating bite, and the press of his lips is so soft that Derek can’t help but shiver.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Don’t go where I can’t
entry.summary:
Author: WhoSaidImFin

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,104Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 12

Summary: Stiles and Derek have been married for two years, and for once, life in Beacon Hills is quiet — until Stiles is brutally attacked while investigating something near a lake and left fighting for his life. Derek is forced to watch helplessly as he’s put on a ventilator, slips into a coma, and nearly dies, and even when Stiles wakes, the wounds don’t heal normally and the nightmares don’t stop. As recovery turns into something far more complicated, both of them struggle with fear, guilt, and the reality that almost losing each other changes everything.

entry.title: Eyes Of The Alpha
entry.summary:
Author: Ash20091990

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,064Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 134

Summary: Derek wants to make a wish to bring back everyone the pack has lost. His soul is calling for him to fix it. He now has to figure out how to be a good Alpha and learn to do it blind.

entry.title: piranha
entry.summary:
Author: sparassiss

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,491Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 96

Summary: The wolf bites him all the time when they do this, when they — get together. Stiles cringes internally at his own thought process, but there’s really no better phrase for it. They’re not together together, not dating or anything, they just — do this sometimes.  Derek’s passionate, attentive, sometimes acting like he’s nearly obsessed with Stiles, gripping his thighs tightly as he rocks into him and sucking possessively on his neck. Biting his jaw, his ear, his bicep, his stomach, his thighs — everywhere except his neck. Stiles tries not to care, knows Derek would never want him like that anyway.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski

  • Stiles Stilinski
